messages.content:
```latex
\newpage
\appendix
\onecolumn
\section*{Appendix Overview}
\addcontentsline{toc}{section}{Appendix}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,topsep=6pt,itemsep=10pt]
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:DynamicQuotaforToolInvocation}}: Dynamic Quota for Tool Invocation
    
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:OverturnMaskingGRPO}}: Over-turn Masking GRPO
    
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:DetailsofDatasetConstruction}}: Details of Dataset Construction
    \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.5em,topsep=4pt,itemsep=3pt]
        \item[\textbullet] Task Type Definition
        \item[\textbullet] Dataset Statistics
    \end{itemize}
    
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:AdditionalImplementationDetails}}: Additional Implementation Details
    \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.5em,topsep=4pt,itemsep=3pt]
        \item[\textbullet] Training Details
        \item[\textbullet] Evaluation Details
    \end{itemize}
    
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:AdditionalAblations}}: Additional Ablations
    \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.5em,topsep=4pt,itemsep=3pt]
        \item[\textbullet] Effectiveness of Different Attention Mask Ratio
        \item[\textbullet] Effectiveness of Verifiable Trajectory-Guided Reward
        \item[\textbullet] Effectiveness of Training Stage
        \item[\textbullet] Efficiency Analysis
    \end{itemize}
    
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:Prompt_Template}}: Prompt Template
    
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:QualitativeAnalysis}}: Qualitative Analysis
    
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:FailureCaseAnalysis}}: Failure Case Analysis
    
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:LimitationsandFutureWork}}: Limitations and Future Work
\end{itemize}

\vspace{1em}
```

**注意事项：**

1. 我为"Additional Implementation Details"添加了一个标签 `\ref{app:sec:AdditionalImplementationDetails}`，因为原文中这个section没有明确的label，但在目录中需要引用。

2. "Qualitative Analysis"、"Failure Case Analysis" 和 "Limitations and Future Work" 这三个section在原文中也没有明确的label，我添加了相应的标签以保持一致性。

3. 如果你希望使用原文中实际存在的label，请在对应的section处添加这些label：
   - `\label{app:sec:AdditionalImplementationDetails}`
   - `\label{app:sec:QualitativeAnalysis}`
   - `\label{app:sec:FailureCaseAnalysis}`
   - `\label{app:sec:LimitationsandFutureWork}`

\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,topsep=6pt,itemsep=10pt]
后面的格式没用起来，是缺package吗

是的，你需要添加 `enumitem` 宏包。在你的文档导言区添加：

```latex
\usepackage{enumitem}
```

这个宏包提供了对列表环境的增强控制，包括：
- `leftmargin`: 控制左边距
- `topsep`: 控制列表前后的垂直间距
- `itemsep`: 控制列表项之间的间距

完整的导言区示例：

```latex
\documentclass{article}
\usepackage{enumitem}  % 添加这个宏包
\usepackage{hyperref}  % 如果使用 \ref 交叉引用

\begin{document}
% 你的内容
\end{document}
```

如果添加宏包后仍然没有效果，可能是因为：

1. **宏包冲突**：检查是否有其他宏包覆盖了 `enumitem` 的设置
2. **加载顺序**：尝试将 `\usepackage{enumitem}` 放在其他列表相关宏包之后
3. **文档类限制**：某些会议模板可能禁用了这些自定义选项

如果你使用的是会议模板（如 NeurIPS、CVPR 等），可以尝试这样加载：

```latex
\usepackage[inline]{enumitem}
```

或者如果模板限制较严格，可以使用基础的调整方式：

```latex
\begin{itemize}
\setlength{\leftmargini}{0pt}
\setlength{\itemsep}{10pt}
\setlength{\topsep}{6pt}
    \item ...
\end{itemize}
```

\appendix
\onecolumn
\section*{Appendix Overview}
\addcontentsline{toc}{section}{Appendix}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,topsep=6pt,itemsep=10pt]
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:DynamicQuotaforToolInvocation}}: Dynamic Quota for Tool Invocation
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:OverturnMaskingGRPO}}: Over-turn Masking GRPO
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:DetailsofDatasetConstruction}}: Details of Dataset Construction
    \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.5em,topsep=4pt,itemsep=3pt]
        \item[\textbullet] Task Type Definition
        \item[\textbullet] Dataset Statistics
    \end{itemize}
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:AdditionalImplementationDetails}}: Additional Implementation Details
    \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.5em,topsep=4pt,itemsep=3pt]
        \item[\textbullet] Training Details
        \item[\textbullet] Evaluation Details
    \end{itemize}
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:AdditionalAblations}}: Additional Ablations
    \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.5em,topsep=4pt,itemsep=3pt]
        \item[\textbullet] Effectiveness of Different Attention Mask Ratio
        \item[\textbullet] Effectiveness of Verifiable Trajectory-Guided Reward
        \item[\textbullet] Effectiveness of Training Stage
        \item[\textbullet] Efficiency Analysis
    \end{itemize}
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:Prompt_Template}}: Prompt Template
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:QualitativeAnalysis}}: Qualitative Analysis
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:FailureCaseAnalysis}}: Failure Case Analysis
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:LimitationsandFutureWork}}: Limitations and Future Work
\end{itemize}
\vspace{1em}
  
感觉现在字体有点小，调大点

可以通过以下几种方式调整字体大小：

**方案1：调整整个列表的字体大小（推荐）**
```latex
\appendix
\onecolumn
\section*{Appendix Overview}
\addcontentsline{toc}{section}{Appendix}

{\large  % 或使用 \Large
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,topsep=6pt,itemsep=10pt]
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:DynamicQuotaforToolInvocation}}: Dynamic Quota for Tool Invocation
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:OverturnMaskingGRPO}}: Over-turn Masking GRPO
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:DetailsofDatasetConstruction}}: Details of Dataset Construction
    \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.5em,topsep=4pt,itemsep=3pt]
        \item[\textbullet] Task Type Definition
        \item[\textbullet] Dataset Statistics
    \end{itemize}
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:AdditionalImplementationDetails}}: Additional Implementation Details
    \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.5em,topsep=4pt,itemsep=3pt]
        \item[\textbullet] Training Details
        \item[\textbullet] Evaluation Details
    \end{itemize}
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:AdditionalAblations}}: Additional Ablations
    \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.5em,topsep=4pt,itemsep=3pt]
        \item[\textbullet] Effectiveness of Different Attention Mask Ratio
        \item[\textbullet] Effectiveness of Verifiable Trajectory-Guided Reward
        \item[\textbullet] Effectiveness of Training Stage
        \item[\textbullet] Efficiency Analysis
    \end{itemize}
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:Prompt_Template}}: Prompt Template
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:QualitativeAnalysis}}: Qualitative Analysis
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:FailureCaseAnalysis}}: Failure Case Analysis
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:LimitationsandFutureWork}}: Limitations and Future Work
\end{itemize}
}

\vspace{1em}
```

**方案2：使用 enumitem 的 font 选项**
```latex
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,topsep=6pt,itemsep=10pt,font=\large]
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:DynamicQuotaforToolInvocation}}: Dynamic Quota for Tool Invocation
    % ... 其他内容
\end{itemize}
```

**方案3：增加行距和间距（保持字体大小）**
```latex
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,topsep=8pt,itemsep=12pt]
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:DynamicQuotaforToolInvocation}}: Dynamic Quota for Tool Invocation
    % ... 其他内容
\end{itemize}
```

**字体大小选项（从小到大）：**
- `\normalsize` - 默认大小
- `\large` - 稍大
- `\Large` - 更大
- `\LARGE` - 很大
- `\huge` - 非常大
- `\Huge` - 最大

**推荐使用方案1**，选择 `\large` 或 `\Large`，这样整个目录看起来更清晰。如果只想让一级列表变大，子列表保持原样，可以这样：

```latex
{\large
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,topsep=6pt,itemsep=10pt]
    \item \textbf{Section \ref{app:sec:DetailsofDatasetConstruction}}: Details of Dataset Construction
    {\normalsize  % 子列表恢复正常大小
    \begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.5em,topsep=4pt,itemsep=3pt]
        \item[\textbullet] Task Type Definition
        \item[\textbullet] Dataset Statistics
    \end{itemize}
    }
    % ... 其他内容
\end{itemize}
}
```
